80C.title: Deduction in respect of life insurance premia, etc.
80C.summary: Allows deduction up to ₹1.5 lakh for specified investments and expenses from gross total income.

80D.title: Deduction for medical insurance premium
80D.summary: Deduction for medical insurance premium paid for self, spouse, children, and parents.

10(10D).title: Exemption on Life Insurance maturity proceeds
10(10D).summary: Any sum received under a life insurance policy, including bonus, is exempt subject to certain conditions regarding premium-to-sum-assured ratio.

44AD.title: Presumptive taxation for businesses
44AD.summary: Allows small businesses with turnover up to ₹2 crore (₹3 crore if digital) to declare income at 8% (6% for digital receipts) without maintaining books.

24(b).title: Deduction for Interest on Home Loan
24(b).summary: Deduction for interest paid on capital borrowed for acquisition or construction of self-occupied house property.
